progress.verification: Four deterministic tests passed. Repository source inspection confirms the workflow names the cloudflare-research environment, references CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, uses cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3, and pins mirror-cartographer-research.

blocker: The repository now machine-checks configuration intent, but actual deployment still requires the cloudflare-research GitHub environment to contain valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values and a successful workflow dispatch.
next_action: Run the auditor in the deployment workflow before readiness classification, then dispatch after the environment secrets are configured and preserve the returned Cloudflare deployment URL and commit-bound proof packet.
